code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5032/api/GameStats';export const GetGameStats=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL));return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetPlayerGameStats=async playerId=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/';const response=await axios.get(url+playerId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};
